(1) These rules may be called the Companies (Registration Offices and Fees) Amendment Rules, 2015. (2) In the Companies (Registration Offices and Fees) Rules, 2014,— (a) in rule 10, after sub-rule (6), the following sub-rule shall be inserted, namely:— “7. Any further information or documents called for, in respect of application or e-form or document, filed electronically with the Ministry of Corporate Affairs shall be furnished in Form No. GNL-4 as an addendum” (b) in the Annexure, after Form No. GNL-3, the following Form shall be inserted, namely:— -- 4 of 8 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 5 FORM NO.
